Video SEO Checklist

📝

Title

Include primary keyword in first 60 characters

📄

Description

First 2 lines should have keyword + compelling reason to click

🏷️

Tags

Use 15-20 tags mixing broad and specific keywords

🖼️

Thumbnail

High contrast, readable text, emotional face or object

⚡

First 30 Seconds

Hook viewers immediately — this determines retention

🎯

End Screen

Always add subscribe button + next video card
